title: Buy or Die?
overview: In the run-down slums of a futuristic city, the boxer only known as Junk Dog is making a living throwing fights for the mob in underground arenas. That all changes when he has a chance encounter with the champion, Yuri.

title: The Man Only Dies Once
overview: Yuri has sought Junk Dog out to test his mettle in the ring, and their encounter will leave the underground fighter a changed man.

title: Gear Is Dead
overview: Nanbu and Joe are preparing for their first official match, but in order to do that, they'll need to find a decent set of Gear first. While searching, they run into a group of orphan boys, thieving their way through life.

title: Let's Dance with Death
overview: JD faces off against his first opponent, hothead Shark ‘Maneater’ Samejima, with a revolutionary gimmick that will take the rest of the boxing world by storm!

title: The Man from Death
overview: When JD receives a fight request from a top tier Megalo Boxer, Team Nowhere can’t believe their luck. But when the boxer in question is revealed to be an old acquaintance of Nanbu, he is forced to come to terms with some past demons he’d thought he’d long since buried.

title: Until the Last Dog Dies
overview: Aragaki is a formidable fighter who aims to destroy Joe at the watchful eye of Nanbu, but Joe will not give up and will follow the teachings of his coach until the end

title: The Road to Death
overview: There's one month until Megalonia begins, and it looks like Shirato Yukiko's brother, Mikio, is a lock for the final entrant into the tournament. Will Joe and Team Nowhere find a way to secure their spot in the Megalo Box championship tournament?

title: Deadline of the Dream
overview: Shirato Mikio has forced Team Nowhere to forfeit a match by threatening to expose Joe and Nanbu's seedy past. Will their dream of making it into the Megalonia tournament ever come true?

title: A Dead Flower Shall Never Bloom
overview: It's man vs machine, as "Gearless" Joe squares off against Shirato Mikio, who is guided by Ace, an artificial intelligence of his own design.

title: The Die Is Cast
overview: Crime boss Fujimaki has decided that Team Nowhere needs to throw their opening match in Megalonia in order to repay their debt to him. Can the team survive this blow to their ambitions? And even if they do, and Joe wins, will they survive the gangster's wrath?

title: A Deadmarch
overview: Joe faces off against the bloody lion, Glen Burroughs. If he wants his friends to live, he'll have to throw the match. After coming this far... is there nothing else Team Nowhere can do?

title: Leap Over the Edge of Death
overview: Inspired by Joe's meteoric rise, and wanting to face him in a fair fight, Yuri makes a decision that will change everything for himself and Yukiko.

title: Born to Die
overview: Joe has risen to the top and finally gets his chance of a rematch with Yuri. Yuri himself also feels joy in his chance to fight with Joe. The final battle begins!

title: Los fantasmas tararean un réquiem
overview: Years after his victory at Megalonia, Joe has become a completely different man, going from one underground ring to another, now fighting as the wandering boxer Nomad.

title: La desesperación da coraje a los cobardes
overview: Joe gets his motorcycle stolen by a boy named Mio and ends up at a settlement for immigrants where he runs into Chief again.

title: Si deseas la dañina pudrición de las raíces, no bloquees la boca del ánfora
overview: Joe helps Chief get ready to fight in the upcoming tournament while dealing with is own demons.

title: Si la flor del alma florece, el amor no se perderá
overview: Chief fights in the last match of the tournament. Will he be victorious?

title: La tierra prometida respondió que el mesiás no se quedará
overview: Joe heads back home to face his past.

title: Aunque estés consciente de tu impotencia, Dios te ofrecerá su imagen para que la pises
overview: Sachio ends up injuring a Megalo-boxer after they caused trouble at Bonjiri's shop. In retaliation, the Megalo-boxer comes back and trashes the place and steals the deed to the shop.

title: El tonto que muestra su carta no es un payaso estúpido
overview: Liu finds out Joe is back in town and asks him to be his sparring partner. Mac Rosario had once lost everything, but made a miraculous comeback as the local hero.

title: Al principio del fin, la trayectoria del arcoíris dibuja un soportal
overview: Mac and Liu face off in the ring finally. Maya goes to talk to Sakuma after she finds Mac acting strange.

title: Una sola mano no basta para vivir, pero aun así la forma de vivir prevalece
overview: Joe continues to try to rebuild Gym Nowhere and Yukiko has some questions for Sakuma about BES.

title: Las derrotas pasadas son acompañadas por señales de buena suerte
overview: The executives don't like Yukiko's decision to possibly end the company's partnership with ROSCO. Meanwhile, Joe and Sachio settle things once and for all.

title: Cuando te quitas la armadura que no te podías quitar, brotan las semillas de la miseria y de la dicha
overview: It's decided that Mac and Joe will get into the ring together, but Mac finds out something shocking from Maya...

title: Aunque las ovaciones se callen, la voz de los mudos no desaparecerá
overview: Mac falls into despair when he finds out the truth and encounters a familiar face from his past.

title: El con alas lleva al sin alas, y el sin alas bendice al con alas
overview: Joe and Mac head into the ring to have their legendary match.
